# Integrating text-to-speech

- [Prerequisites](#prerequisites)
- [Create the Android plug-in](#create-the-android-plug-in)

## Prerequisites

- Unity project configured as described in [setup.md](setup.md)

## Create the Android plug-in

1. In `Assets/Plugins/Android`, create `TtsPlugin.java` with the following content:
```java
// Modified from version generated by Gemini
package com.yourorg.xr; // Customize the package name as desired

import android.app.Activity;
import android.speech.tts.TextToSpeech;
import com.unity3d.player.UnityPlayer;
import java.util.Locale;

public class TtsPlugin {
    private static TextToSpeech tts = null;
    private static boolean initialized = false;

    public static void initialize() {
        final Activity activity = UnityPlayer.currentActivity;
        activity.runOnUiThread(() -> {
            if (tts != null) return;

            tts = new TextToSpeech(activity, new TextToSpeech.OnInitListener() {
                @Override
                public void onInit(int status) {
                    if (status == TextToSpeech.SUCCESS) {
                        // Sets default engine language to US English
                        int result = tts.setLanguage(Locale.US);
                        if (result != TextToSpeech.LANG_MISSING_DATA && result != TextToSpeech.LANG_NOT_SUPPORTED) {
                            initialized = true;
                        }
                    }
                }
            });
        });
    }

    public static void speak(final String text) {
        if (tts == null || !initialized) return;

        final Activity activity = UnityPlayer.currentActivity;
        activity.runOnUiThread(() -> {
            // QUEUE_FLUSH interrupts any current speech to play the new text immediately
            tts.speak(text, TextToSpeech.QUEUE_FLUSH, null, "UnityTTS");
        });
    }

    public static void shutdown() {
        final Activity activity = UnityPlayer.currentActivity;
        activity.runOnUiThread(() -> {
            if (tts == null) return;

            tts.stop();
            tts.shutdown();
            tts = null;
            initialized = false;
        });
    }
}
```
2. Initialize the TTS plug-in in the `Start()` method of a Unity script via the following snippet:
```csharp
using AndroidJavaClass ttsPlugin = new("com.yourcompany.xr.TtsPlugin");
ttsPlugin.CallStatic("initialize");
```
3. Trigger the TTS plug-in via the following:
```csharp
ttsPlugin.CallStatic("speak", text);
```
4. Shut down the TTS plug-in in `OnDestroy()`:
```csharp
ttsPlugin.CallStatic("shutdown");
```
